_comment: Cross-language DEFLATE interop fixture. `b64` is base64(zlib/DEFLATE(raw)) and is byte-identical from pako (TS) and zlib (Python). Both Wave/src/sync/compress.test.ts and server/tests/test_compress.py assert they inflate it back to `raw`, proving the app and server speak the same wire.
raw: Wave LoRa interop check - opposing muscles work in pairs. 1234567890
